items.title: Bitcoin's quantum debate splits as Adam Back pushes optional upgrades over forced freeze
items.summary: The Blockstream CEO told Paris Blockchain Week that Bitcoin should build quantum-resistant upgrades now, a day after Jameson Lopp proposed freezing vulnerable coins instead.

items.title: Bitcoin should prepare now, even if quantum is a 'lab experiment’: Adam Back
items.summary: Back said the safest approach is to build optional upgrades that would allow Bitcoin to migrate to quantum-resistant cryptography once it's needed.

items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: Try our new dimensional analysis Claude plugin
items.summary: We’re releasing a new Claude plugin for developing and auditing code that implements dimensional analysis, a technique we explored in our most recent blog post. Most LLM-based security skills ask the model to find bugs. Our new dimensional-analysis plugin for Claude Code takes a

items.title: Spotting issues in DeFi with dimensional analysis
items.summary: Using dimensional analysis, you can categorically rule out a whole category of logic and arithmetic bugs that plague DeFi formulas. No code changes required, just better reasoning! One of the first lessons in physics is learning to think in terms of dimensions. Physicists can oft

items.title: Bitcoin steady as S&P 500 hits record, but options market isn't buying the peace trade
items.summary: Crypto's derivatives desks still want downside protection, QCP says, and long-end yields and gold aren't confirming the risk-on move.

items.title: Beyond ‘digital gold,’ Iran conflict forces a rethink of the nature of bitcoin
items.summary: Bitcoin's 12% gain since the Iran war began isn't a risk-on trade. It's the market repricing bitcoin's role as a neutral settlement layer, Bitwise's CIO argues.

items.title: Only 4% of Danish citizens hold crypto, far below other European countries
items.summary: Only 4% of Danish citizens own crypto, far below other European countries, as banks, taxes and risk fears limit adoption, according to a new staff paper from the country's central bank.

items.title: Bitcoin is testing a level that capped its rally in January, CryptoQuant says
items.summary: Macro-driven ETF inflows have lifted prices, but CryptoQuant data signals large holders are positioning to sell near a key breakeven zone

items.title: Bitcoin rally is taking a breather near $75,000. Onchain data shows why
items.summary: BTC is up 10% for the month, but the bull run has stalled near $75,000 in the past 48 hours. Here's why.

items.title: Dogecoin jumps 4.5% to nearly 10-cents, outperforming bitcoin and ether
items.summary: Breakout backed by heavy participation and late-session buying, though weak on-chain activity raises questions over durability.

items.title: Ripple partners with Korea's Kyobo Life to tokenize government bond settlement
items.summary: The deal is Ripple's first with a Korean insurer and targets near real-time settlement of Korean treasuries, though the release stops short of committing to a live volume or timeline.

items.title: Bitcoin devs bet a quantum attacker will play nice with a ‘wait and react’ plan
items.summary: BitMEX Research proposes a canary system that pays a bounty to the first quantum attacker and activates a network-wide freeze, offering an alternative to a fixed five-year timeline.

items.title: US should scrap crypto capital gains tax to fuel competition: Cato
items.summary: Crypto users in the US are required to pay capital gains taxes on cryptocurrencies, stifling their usefulness as a currency, argued a Washingon DC-based think tank.

items.title: Trump’s World Liberty under fire for ‘absurd’ token unlock plan
items.summary: Major World Liberty Financial investor Justin Sun called a plan to lock tokens for up to four years “the most absurd governance scams I have ever seen.”

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin fund overtakes WisdomTree after 6 trading days
items.summary: The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust is also within striking distance of overtaking three other US spot Bitcoin ETFs that launched in January 2024.

items.title: China already has the compute to train its own Mythos-like AI: Nvidia CEO
items.summary: The amount of capacity and the type of compute it was trained on is “abundantly available in China,” said the Nvidia CEO.

items.title: Tech stocks push Nasdaq, S&P 500 to record highs as Bitcoin taps $75K
items.summary: Tech stocks helped drive the Nasdaq to 24,016 and the S&P 500 to 7,022 as Bitcoin climbed nearly 10% over the past two weeks.

items.title: CFTC probes oil futures trades tied to Trump's moves in Iran: Report
items.summary: The CFTC is investigating trades that took place before the US delayed strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure on March 23 and agreed to a ceasefire with Iran on April 7.

items.title: BitMEX pitches ‘canary fund’ alternative to Bitcoin quantum coin freeze
items.summary: It may be appropriate to attempt to mitigate the extent of the freeze as much as possible, even at the cost of greater complexity, said BitMEX.
